categories.title: Full Stack Web Development
categories.description: Frontend, backend, database, authentication, APIs, and deployment for internship-ready web apps.

topics.name: How the web works
topics.outcome: Understand clients, servers, requests, responses, and hosting.

topics.name: HTML document structure
topics.outcome: Know head, body, metadata, and script/style placement.

topics.name: Browser rendering basics
topics.outcome: Understand how HTML, CSS, and JS become pixels.

topics.name: Git and GitHub basics
topics.outcome: Create commits, branches, push, pull, and PRs.

topics.name: Command line basics
topics.outcome: Navigate folders and run project commands.

topics.name: Semantic elements
topics.outcome: Use header, nav, main, section, article, footer correctly.

topics.name: Text and media tags
topics.outcome: Use headings, paragraphs, links, images, audio, and video.

topics.name: Lists and tables
topics.outcome: Create ordered, unordered, definition lists, and tables.

topics.name: Forms and inputs
topics.outcome: Build login forms, contact forms, and validations.

topics.name: Accessibility basics
topics.outcome: Use labels, alt text, roles, and keyboard-friendly markup.

topics.name: SEO basics
topics.outcome: Use title, meta tags, semantic structure, and headings well.

topics.name: HTML5 APIs
topics.outcome: Know localStorage, geolocation, and basic browser APIs.

topics.name: Selectors and specificity
topics.outcome: Understand how CSS rules win or lose.

topics.name: Box model
topics.outcome: Master margin, border, padding, and content.

topics.name: Display types
topics.outcome: Know block, inline, inline-block, flex, grid, none.

topics.name: Flexbox
topics.outcome: Align and distribute items in one direction.

topics.name: Grid
topics.outcome: Build multi-column layouts and responsive grids.

topics.name: Positioning
topics.outcome: Use relative, absolute, fixed, sticky, and z-index.

topics.name: Overflow and sizing
topics.outcome: Handle width, height, max/min, overflow, object-fit.

topics.name: Responsive design
topics.outcome: Use media queries and fluid layouts.

topics.name: Tailwind CSS
topics.outcome: Use utility classes for speed and consistency.

topics.name: Variables and data types
topics.outcome: Work with let, const, strings, numbers, booleans, null, undefined.

topics.name: Loops and iteration
topics.outcome: Use for, while, for...of, forEach, map, filter, reduce.

topics.name: Functions
topics.outcome: Write declarations, expressions, arrow functions, closures.

topics.name: Objects and arrays
topics.outcome: Store structured data and manipulate it.

topics.name: Events
topics.outcome: Handle clicks, input changes, submit, keypress.

topics.name: Async JavaScript
topics.outcome: Learn promises, async/await, fetch, error handling.

topics.name: JSX
topics.outcome: Write UI in JavaScript with component syntax.

topics.name: State
topics.outcome: Store changing UI data with useState.

topics.name: Effects
topics.outcome: Fetch data and sync with useEffect.

topics.name: Refs
topics.outcome: Access DOM nodes and preserve values with useRef.

topics.name: Conditional rendering
topics.outcome: Show different UI based on state.

topics.name: Routing
topics.outcome: Build multi-page apps with React Router.

topics.name: State sharing
topics.outcome: Use lifting state, context, and custom hooks.

topics.name: Authentication
topics.outcome: Use sessions or JWTs for login.

topics.name: Authorization
topics.outcome: Restrict data and routes by role.

topics.name: Error handling
topics.outcome: Return proper status codes and messages.

topics.name: Environment variables
topics.outcome: Keep secrets out of source code.

topics.name: Deployment workflow
topics.outcome: Ship frontend and backend to production.

topics.name: Performance basics
topics.outcome: Reduce bundle size and improve load times.

topics.name: Project polishing
topics.outcome: Add loading states, empty states, and toasts.

topics.name: Todo app
topics.outcome: Task CRUD with filters and localStorage.

topics.name: Student hub
topics.outcome: Combine todo, calculator, notes, and roadmap pages.

topics.name: Auth dashboard
topics.outcome: Login, signup, protected pages, profile management.

categories.title: DSA
categories.description: Patterns, problem solving, and interview preparation in C++.

topics.name: Recursion
topics.outcome: Understand base case, recursive case, stack frames.

topics.name: Binary search
topics.outcome: Search sorted spaces and answer spaces.

topics.name: Counting sort
topics.outcome: Use when value range is limited.

topics.name: Queue basics
topics.outcome: Use FIFO for level-order and buffering.

topics.name: Tree terminology
topics.outcome: Learn root, child, leaf, depth, height.

topics.name: Traversals
topics.outcome: Do preorder, inorder, postorder, level order.

topics.name: Cycle detection
topics.outcome: Detect loops in directed and undirected graphs.

topics.name: Sliding window on strings
topics.outcome: Work with counts and valid windows.

topics.name: Debugging discipline
topics.outcome: Trace inputs, states, and edge cases.

topics.name: Rewrites
topics.outcome: Solve again without watching the solution.

categories.title: Operating Systems
categories.description: Processes, threads, scheduling, synchronization, memory, and files.

topics.name: Kernel and shell
topics.outcome: Know the core and the interface.

topics.name: System calls
topics.outcome: Bridge user programs and kernel services.

topics.name: Deadlock prevention
topics.outcome: Break one of the necessary conditions.

topics.name: LRU replacement
topics.outcome: Least recently used page gets replaced.

categories.title: Computer Organization & Architecture
categories.description: How a computer executes instructions and organizes hardware components.

topics.name: Binary arithmetic
topics.outcome: Add, subtract, and represent signed numbers.

topics.name: Logic gates
topics.outcome: Use AND, OR, NOT, XOR, NAND, NOR.

topics.name: Demultiplexer
topics.outcome: Send one input to many outputs.

topics.name: Cache memory
topics.outcome: Store frequently used data close to CPU.

topics.name: Memory hierarchy
topics.outcome: L1, L2, L3, RAM, secondary storage.

topics.name: Throughput
topics.outcome: Measure completed work per unit time.

categories.title: DBMS & SQL
categories.description: Relational modeling, transactions, and querying structured data.

topics.name: File system vs DBMS
topics.outcome: See the limitations of raw file handling.

topics.name: Aggregate functions
topics.outcome: Use COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX.

categories.title: Computer Networks
categories.description: Networking concepts, protocols, addressing, routing, and performance.

topics.name: What is a network
topics.outcome: Understand connected devices and resource sharing.

topics.name: Network devices
topics.outcome: Hub, switch, router, modem, access point.

categories.title: AI / Machine Learning
categories.description: Data handling, model training, evaluation, deep learning, and AI projects.

topics.name: Model metrics
topics.outcome: Use accuracy, precision, recall, F1, RMSE.

categories.title: Web3
categories.description: Blockchain, smart contracts, wallets, and decentralized applications.

topics.name: Consensus basics
topics.outcome: Learn how networks agree on state.

topics.name: Transactions
topics.outcome: Move value and data on chain.

topics.name: Data types
topics.outcome: Use uint, address, bool, string, bytes.
